steps.title: Identify the direction
steps.content: Marisol expects to have $3\%$ more money each year than she had the previous year. Because the amount increases each year, the model is increasing.

steps.title: Identify the model type
steps.content:
A percent increase uses a constant multiplier. Here, each year multiplies the previous balance by $1.03$, so the model is exponential rather than linear.
The answer is C.
